title: Iran Fired 7 Missiles at Kuwait's Airport. Flights Were Suspended.
script: Iran launched 7 ballistic missiles and drones at Kuwait International Airport on Thursday, forcing the suspension of all flights. Terminal 1 took direct hits. Kuwait declared a national emergency. Iran said it was responding to US strikes on its military positions. Tehran is now demanding $24 billion in frozen assets before nuclear talks resume. Iranian officials called the negotiations a complete deadlock. The Persian Gulf just became the most dangerous airspace on Earth.
